summary: Sprint 12 is progressing well with all major features on track. Timeline shows amber due to 2-day delay in API integration, but mitigation plan is in place. Two medium-level risks require monitoring.
scope_status: All Sprint 12 scope items are in progress or completed. No scope creep detected this week.
timeline_status: 2-day delay in API integration due to third-party documentation gaps. Mitigation: extended sprint by 1 day and added weekend support.
risk_status: Two medium risks active: API rate limits and PCI DSS compliance definition. Both have mitigation plans.
budget_status: Spent 77.5% of budget with 60% timeline remaining. Forecast shows 2.5% overrun due to extended timeline.
quality_status: Test coverage at 78.5%. 2 critical defects resolved this week. CI pipeline stability improved.
decisions_needed: Approve budget increase of $5K for extended timeline
Approve production deployment with pending PCI DSS final certification

next_actions.action: Finalize API integration recovery plan by EOD Friday
Get final approval from client on dashboard design
